title: A Caper Worth Millions: The Lufthansa Heist

scenes.text: Over five million dollars vanished in mere minutes.
It happened in New York City, at JFK Airport.
In 1978, a group orchestrated a heist that still remains unresolved.
Not a single suspect was ever convicted.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 New York City, USA - 1978. A meticulously planned heist stole over five million dollars from JFK Airport, and no one was ever convicted. Follow for daily cold cases!
